items.title: Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual agreement
items.summary: Chelsea have announced that winger Raheem Sterling has left the club by mutual consent.

items.title: Rodman coaxes dance from Hayes in USWNT rout
items.summary: Trinity Rodman capped off the USWNT's 5-0 rout of Chile by coaxing coach Emma Hayes into a sideline dance, as a young American squad secured its fifth consecutive shutout Tuesday night.

items.title: Sources: Fulham, Man City agree Oscar Bobb deal
items.summary: Manchester City have agreed a fee with Fulham for winger Oscar Bobb, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Fulham to sign Manchester City’s Bobb for £27m, Paquetá heading to Flamengo
items.summary: West Ham do Paqueta deal and sign Fulham’s Traoré Ward-Prowse poised for Burnley loan from West Ham Manchester City have agreed a £27m deal to sell Oscar Bobb to Fulham, with the terms including a 20% sell-on clause. City also have matching rights for the Norwegian should he be sold. An identical agreement allowed City to bring back James Trafford from Burnley in the summer for the amount Newcastle had agreed to pay for the goalkeeper. Trafford left City for Turf Moor in July 2023. Continue reading...

items.title: Zanotti fires Corinthians to shock semi-final win over Gotham in Women’s Champions Cup
items.summary: Gotham FC 0-1 Corinthians (Zanotti 83) Corinthians’ 40-year-old captain scores late winner Corinthians earned a stunning victory against Gotham FC in the first semi-final of the inaugural Fifa Women’s Champions Cup, a goal from the 40-year-old Corinthians captain Gabi Zanotti in the 83rd minute the difference. “Everyone was talking about maybe Gotham and Arsenal in the final but Corinthians are here and we played a very good game to beat the NWSL champions,” their manager, Lucas Piccinato, said. “We know what we can do.” Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Bayern deelt beelden van het Philips Stadion en Eindhoven
items.summary: PSV speelt woensdagavond om 21.00 uur in eigen huis tegen Bayern München in de Champions League. Het lijkt er sterk op dat de huidige acht punten van de Eindhovenaren niet genoeg zijn voor een plek in de tussenronde, waardoor PSV een stunt nodig heeft. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live. Voor het duel van Ajax en de overige CL-duels hebben we aparte liveblogs.

items.title: VI Live: bekijk hier het XXL-Champions League-programma
items.summary: Woensdagavond staat de laatste speelronde van de competitiefase van de Champions League op het programma. Alle 36 clubs komen in actie, verdeeld over 18 wedstrijden. Voor PSV en Ajax hebben we een apart blog. In deze VI Live volg je de verrichtingen op de andere 16 velden.

items.title: Skiete Willy Podcast Extra: 'PSV moet tegen Bayern soms pragmatischer zijn'
items.summary: Clubwatcher Tim Reedijk en Marco Timmer hebben het in deze Skiete Willy Podcast Extra onder meer over de cruciale Champions League-wedstrijd van PSV tegen Bayern München. Maar de mannen bespreken ook de contractsituatie van Peter Bosz, het mogelijke vertrek van Ricardo Pepi en de fitheid van de PSV-selectie.

items.title: Reed set for PGA Tour return after quitting LIV Golf
items.summary: Patrick Reed is set to make a return to the PGA Tour after announcing his decision to quit LIV Golf.

items.title: VI Live: Griekse fans vieren feest in Amsterdam
items.summary: Ajax neemt het woensdagavond om 21.00 uur op tegen Olympiakos Piraeus in de Champions League. De Amsterdammers moeten zelf winnen om nog kans te maken op een plek in de tussenronde. Daarnaast zijn zij afhankelijk van de concurrentie. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live. We hebben ook een speciale VI Live voor PSV - Bayern München en de overige duels in de Champions League .

items.title: PSV bezig met verhuur Nagalo
items.summary: PSV gaat vermoedelijk afscheid nemen van Adamo Nagalo. De 23-jarige centrale verdediger gaat volgens Turkse bronnen aan de slag bij Konyaspor. Een huurtransfer is in de maak.

items.title: Raheem Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual consent and seeks fresh start
items.summary: Winger was highest earner at £325,000 a week He has not played this season after being frozen out Raheem Sterling is looking to revive his career after departing Chelsea by mutual consent. The 31-year-old winger was the club’s highest earner but has been out of favour since the summer of 2024. Sterling had 18 months left on a deal worth £325,000 a week. Sterling struggled to produce his best form after joining from Manchester City in 2022. He was the first player to arrive under the Todd Boehly-Clearlake Capital ownership and was hailed as a marquee signing. Continue reading...

items.title: Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual consent
items.summary: Raheem Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual consent after reaching an agreement on his departure.

items.title: Chelsea announce Sterling departure in 60-word statement
items.summary: Raheem Sterling has left Chelsea after three and a half years at the club.

items.title: Browns hiring Monken as head coach
items.summary: The Cleveland Browns are naming Todd Monken as their next head coach, NFL Network reported on Wednesday.

items.title: Fulham agree to sign Man City winger Bobb for £27m
items.summary: Fulham agree a £27million deal with Manchester City to sign Oscar Bobb.

items.title: Fulham agree £27m deal to sign Bobb
items.summary: Fulham have agreed a £27m deal with Manchester City to sign forward Oscar Bobb.

items.title: Leon Goretzka says Donald Trump ‘makes us feel not only German but European’
items.summary: Midfielder speaks out on politics before World Cup Goretzka open to summer move to England from Bayern The Germany international Leon Goretzka has said Donald Trump’s actions have left him feeling “not only German but also European”. The US president has recently threatened to take Greenland by force and called Europe “weak” and “decaying”. Goretzka, who hopes to make the Germany squad for the World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico this summer, told Die Zeit: “Of course, I’m aware of the political debates. I still expect it to be a great tournament – it will promote football there, and show many people want an incredibly exciting game. Donald Trump makes us feel not only German but also European.” Continue reading...

items.title: West Ham agree £35.5m sale of Paqueta to Flamengo
items.summary: West Ham agree a deal to sell Brazil forward Lucas Paqueta to Flamengo for more than 41m euros (£35.5m).

items.title: Tielemans out until April as Villa injuries mount
items.summary: Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans is been ruled out for up to 10 weeks, Unai Emery has confirmed.
